calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karla Ellis-Davis, #12998.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A.
No appearance by defendant Andy W. Finn.
Amended default was entered against defendant on July 16, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 14, 2007.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Andy W. Finn as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,573.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $560.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $28,133.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
